name: P. aeruginosa quorum sensor (LasR + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Flags contamination by Pseudomonas aeruginosa by sensing its quorum-sensing signal 3-oxo-C12-HSL. The LasR sensor gates a CRISPRi inverter driving a pigment reporter, in safe E. coli K-12.

input.detects: The acyl-homoserine-lactone quorum signal secreted by Pseudomonas aeruginosa
input.operatingRange: LasR sensors respond from low nM AHL

sensing.sensorMechanism: LasR binds 3-oxo-C12-HSL and activates the pLas (PlasI) promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: AHL -> LasR activates pLas -> pLas transcribes an anti-pigment sgRNA -> CRISPRi represses a constitutive chromoprotein, OR (preferred turn-on) a paired inverter yields pigment-ON when the pathogen signal is present.

parts.name: LasR receptor
parts.source: P. aeruginosa lasR; Meyer et al. 2019, Nat. Chem. Biol. (Marionette sensors)

parts.name: J23119 promoter
parts.notes: Drives the reporter targeted by CRISPRi.

output.result: Colour change indicates P. aeruginosa quorum signal in the sample.

performance.limitOfDetection: LasR AHL sensor module: low-nM 3-oxo-C12-HSL (module-validated, Marionette).
performance.notes: The LasR AHL sensor (Marionette) and CRISPRi are validated separately; the integrated device here is a design template. Detects the pathogen's signal molecule, not the live pathogen itself.

safety.biocontainment: Sensing is done by safe E. coli K-12 reading a secreted small molecule; no pathogen is handled or cultured.
safety.notes: Indirect, safe detection: the chassis senses an AHL signal, so no BSL-2 pathogen culture is required.

buildSteps.title: Design the anti-reporter sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the chromoprotein promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: constitutive LasR. TU2: pLas -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9 + J23119 -> reporter. Add a second inverter for turn-on output.

buildSteps.title: Add sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate with the filtered water/clinical sample and an AHL standard curve.

buildSteps.title: Score colour
buildSteps.description: Read pigment by eye or camera.

provenance.source: Design template combining the validated LasR AHL quorum-sensing module with a dCas9 CRISPRi reporter circuit
partsSources: Meyer et al. 2019, Nat. Chem. Biol. (Marionette LasR AHL sensor)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
